extraction.one_line_summary: DE LA CRUZ Dylan won from bunch sprint after solo CORT Magnus collected all KOM points uncontested for 182km.
tactical_patterns: Magnus CORT solo breakaway for KOM points went uncontested by entire peloton despite telegraphed attack from opening pedal strokes.
Quick Step attempted hat-trick of stage wins with LAMPAERT leading out but GROENEWEGEN attacked through center gap successfully.
Crash at 11km caused GC time splits before 3km rule despite calm 12-13kph winds suggesting positioning not aggressive enough.

rider_signals.CORT Magnus: positive: Six consecutive KOM wins shows peloton willing to gift jersey rather than contest early breakaways on flat stages.
rider_signals.GROENEWEGEN Dylan: positive: First Tour win in three years finding gap through center when LAMPAERT leadout boxed in traditional sprint trains.
rider_signals.VAN AERT Wout: negative: Boxed in sprint position for second consecutive stage despite Jumbo-Visma resources suggests leadout coordination problems.
